steps.name: Creating Inwarranty Job with Create Job API
Setting up the BaseURI, Content Type as Application/JSON and Attaching the SensitiveData Filter for a role and attaching payload
Getting Property Value from the config file
Getting the Auth token for the Role

parameters.name: payLoad
parameters.value: CreateJobPayload[mst_service_location_id=1, mst_platform_id=2, mst_warrenty_status_id=1, mst_oem_id=1, customer=Customer[first_name=tushar, last_name=shelar, mobile_number=9321075789, mobile_number_alt=, email_id=tds@gmail.com, email_id_alt=], customer_address=CustomerAddress[flat_number=A 201, apartment_name=Alliance, street_name=Karve Nager, landmark=Phoenix, area=Pune, pincode=401101, country=India, state=Maharashtra], customer_product=CustomerProduct[dop=2026-03-04T17:54:21.449829121Z, serial_number=92388284085858, imei1=92388284085858, imei2=92388284085858, popurl=2026-03-04T17:54:21.449858447Z, product_id=1, mst_model_id=1], problems=[Problems[id=6, remark=Display Issue]]]
